emails.subject: Resume-Jeff Andrews
emails.body: Resume-Jeff Andrews Vince, Attached is the evaluation form and resume for your interview w/ Jeff Andrews this afternoon at 5pm. I will bring him to your office at that time. Jeff is interviewing for a research position within the coal group. Please feel free to contact if there are any questions. Thanks Chris Williams ENA Staffing x39866
